tips.title: Share state across components with useState, never a module-level ref, on SSR
tips.explanation: On the server a module-level `ref` is created once and shared by every request, so one user's cart can leak into another's response — a real data-isolation bug, not just a style issue. `useState` is request-scoped and SSR-friendly: each request gets its own instance, and the value is serialized into the payload so it survives hydration. Always reach for `useState` (keyed) for cross-component shared state in Nuxt.
